title: Kumar's Mentoring Session
description: A narrative lesson on mentorship vocabulary, active listening, and professional advice.
summary_pt_br: Linguagem de mentoria: 'O que eu escuto...', 'Você já considerou?', 'Minha perspectiva honesta'.

scenes.subtitle_en: A narrative lesson on mentorship vocabulary, active listening, and professional advice.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Linguagem de mentoria: 'O que eu escuto...', 'Você já considerou?', 'Minha perspectiva honesta'.

scenes.text_en: A narrative lesson on mentorship vocabulary, active listening, and professional advice. Today's focus: kumar's mentoring session. What I hear you saying is that you feel undervalued.
scenes.text_pt: Linguagem de mentoria: 'O que eu escuto...', 'Você já considerou?', 'Minha perspectiva honesta'. Foco de hoje: kumar's mentoring session. O que eu escuto é que você se sente desvalorizada.

scenes.title: Kumar's Mentoring Session
scenes.body_en: Mentoring language: 'What I hear you saying is...', 'Have you considered...?', 'My honest perspective is...', 'Let's explore that further'.
scenes.body_pt: Linguagem de mentoria: 'O que eu escuto...', 'Você já considerou?', 'Minha perspectiva honesta'.

examples.en: What I hear you saying is that you feel undervalued.
examples.pt: O que eu escuto é que você se sente desvalorizada.

examples.en: Have you considered speaking directly with your manager?
examples.pt: Você já considerou falar diretamente com seu gestor?

examples.en: My honest perspective is that you're ready for more.
examples.pt: Minha visão sincera é que você está pronta pra mais.

exercise.question: Complete: "What I hear you saying is that you feel ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "What I hear you saying is that you feel undervalued."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O que eu escuto é que você se sente desvalorizada.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Have you considered speaking directly with your manager?
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Have you considered speaking directly with your manager?"
exercise.hint_pt_br: Você já considerou falar diretamente com seu gestor?

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Kumar's Mentoring Session — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre kumar's mentoring session. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Kumar, I feel stuck in my career right now.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: What I hear is you feel undervalued at work.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, exactly. My ideas get ignored.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Have you considered presenting data with each idea?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I haven't. I just speak from experience.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Try combining both for your next proposal.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What if my manager still dismisses me?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Document everything and request a formal review.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Lead with curiosity; follow with courage.

scenes.title: A mentoring Tuesday
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe the mentee's issue and Kumar's approach. Use at least three mentoring phrases.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Every Tuesday at four, Kumar met with a former student over coffee to talk about careers and courage.

paragraphs.speaker: Mentee
paragraphs.en: I feel invisible at work. My ideas vanish the moment I speak them.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: What I hear you saying is that visibility and validation both feel missing right now.

paragraphs.speaker: Mentee
paragraphs.en: Exactly. And I don't know how to change the dynamic without sounding difficult.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: My honest perspective is that documenting your contributions is not complaint — it's professional clarity.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Sometimes being heard, Kumar believed, was the single most underrated skill in modern professional life.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Kumar's Mentoring Session". A narrative lesson on mentorship vocabulary, active listening, and professional advice. What I hear you saying is that you feel undervalued. Have you considered speaking directly with your manager? Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Kumar's Mentoring Session". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Kumar's Mentoring Session".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
